source.title: Temu Seller Portal + Fee Structure Research

extractions.claim: Temu seller portal (seller.temu.com) advertises: no registration fees, 50% of new sellers make first sale within 20 days, accepts US individual and business sellers.
extractions.evidence: From seller.temu.com browsed 2026-03-20: 'Temu does not charge any registration fees.' '50% of new sellers make their first sale within 20 days.' Accepts Corporation, Partnership, Sole Proprietorship, and individual sellers.

verification.verifier_notes: Direct observation from browsing seller.temu.com on 2026-03-20

extractions.claim: Temu seller commission rates: 2-5% early stage, rising to 8-15% as platform matures. 2026 sellers should budget 8-15% total fees (commissions + advertising + fulfillment).
extractions.evidence: Commission rates range 2-5% per sale initially. As of 2026, sellers should budget for 8-15% total fees. UK zero-commission model offered in 2025 for market entry.

verification.verifier_notes: Multiple seller guide sources: m2ecloud, inriver, litcommerce, getonecart. Rates vary by category and seller tier.

extractions.claim: Semi-managed model fees: storage $0.12/cubic foot/day, order fulfillment ~$0.85/order, plus PayPal processing 2.9% + $0.30/transaction.
extractions.evidence: Storage fees: $0.12 per cubic foot per day. Order fulfillment: approximately $0.85 per order. PayPal processing: 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction.

verification.verifier_notes: From semi-managed model fee guides. Competitive vs Amazon FBA storage ($0.87/cubic foot/month = $0.029/day).

extractions.claim: Temu now operates three parallel models: fully-managed (Temu controls everything), semi-managed (merchant handles logistics), and third-party platform (merchant has full autonomy, launched March 2025).
extractions.evidence: Three operating models: (1) Full hosting - Temu controls pricing, logistics, customer service. (2) Semi-hosted - merchant handles warehouse/shipping, Temu handles traffic/pricing/after-sales. (3) Third-party platform (launched March 2025) - sellers independently select products, set prices, ship directly.

verification.verifier_notes: Evolution from single fully-managed model to three models in under 2 years represents significant strategic flexibility.
